title: Wave Function Collapse — Dungeon Slice
description: WFC dungeon/cave generation: LLM picks grid size + tile size; deterministic WFC engine collapses tilemap with adjacency constraints. Covers small dungeon, large dungeon, caves, and corridors.

prompts.prompt: Generate a small 8x8 dungeon with rooms and connecting corridors. Use tile size 2.0m.
Build a large 12x12 dungeon with multiple rooms. Tile size 2.0m.
Create a cave system. 8x8 grid with 2.5m tile size for larger chambers.
Generate a tight corridor maze. 12x12 dungeon with 1.5m tile size.
